requirements.description: Every fourth-wave child bead maps to a pushed commit, source paths, test or fixture paths when applicable, docs or evidence paths, validation commands, close reason, and claim-boundary text.

The checklist covers the dry-run action planner, work admission gate, budget lease simulator, turn pressure ledger, extension quarantine rehearsal, operator handoff summary, stale evidence renewal queue, operator docs, source boundaries, pushed refs, and quality gates.
A passing gate may close the final gate and parent epic only after the closeout commit lands and the branch is pushed. A failing gate must emit follow-up Beads instead of optimistic closeout.
All heavy Cargo validation evidence must prove RCH execution, including the fourth-wave closeout contract test plus cargo check and clippy.
The closeout gate is evidence over Beads, git, docs, contracts, tests, RCH, Agent Mail, UBS, and child artifacts. It does not replace those sources of truth.

The closeout gate must not mutate coordination state, enforce runtime throttles, regenerate evidence, quarantine extensions, or make release-facing performance, capacity, benchmark, or strict drop-in claims.
